Projects

Brand Strategy · Consulting 2025–2026

Complex Media

Student Strategist · IYA Focus Group

Selected as part of a small IYA student focus group brought in by Complex Media following their acquisition to help evolve their brand and digital presence. Met with the team in Fall 2025 — feedback contributed to a full website redesign. Returned in Spring 2026 for a second session with most of Complex's senior leadership team for a think tank on the brand's long-term strategic direction, exploring their content-commerce-experience flywheel and how to deepen cultural relevance.

Brand Strategy UX Feedback Growth Strategy Media & Culture
Brand Strategy · Collab 2025

Chrome Hearts x Crocs

Co-Creator · Business Strategy

Developed a conceptual collaboration between Chrome Hearts and Crocs, built around an immersive brand narrative. Designed a business model centered on 1-of-1 auction pieces with certificates of authenticity, a storytelling unboxing experience, and a limited 1,000-unit shield release to scale hype. The concept was a planning and pitch stage project — never produced or brought to market.

Brand Strategy Business Planning Collab Design Marketing
Brand · Product Design 2025

Ascent

Co-Creator · Business & Product Strategy

Modular alpine shoe adapting from hiking to climbing. Led competitor analysis, business planning, and crowdfunding strategy targeting 1,000 early adopters. Co-developed biomimicry-inspired sole designs and product positioning. The project was carried through the concept and planning stage — never manufactured or brought to market.

Business Planning Brand Identity Competitor Analysis Product Design
Brand Strategy · Marketing 2025

Sabi Juice

Brand Strategist · ACAD 174

Developed scaling strategy for Sabi, a Latino-founded wellness juice brand. Delivered recommendations on social media voice, community building, influencer partnerships, and a subscription model to grow revenue without losing brand identity.

Brand Strategy Marketing Growth Planning Community
